session.user:
Run these commands and report results: 1. `uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/reopen_contested_threads.py tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_reopen_contested_threads.py` 2. `uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_reopen_contested_threads.py -v`
Working directory: /home/runner/work/erk/erk
Report all output and exit codes. Do NOT fix anything.
session.assistant: I'll run both commands and report the results.

tool_use.param: Check ruff linting on reopen_contested_threads files
